options.name: -combinational_from_to
options.description: Defines path defined by -from/to pins as combinational

options.name: -fall
options.description: Apply the assertion at the falling edge of the signal on the path endpoints

options.name: -fall_from
options.description: Applies the minimum delay constraint at the falling edge of the signal on the from pins

options.name: -fall_through
options.description: Applies the assertion at the falling edge of the signal on the through pins

options.name: -fall_to
options.description: Applies the minimum delay constraint at the falling edge of the signal on the to pins

options.name: -from
options.description: Applies the minimum delay constraint to all paths originating from the from_list list

options.name: -ignore_clock_latency
options.description: Defines path as combinational w/o launch/capture clock latencies

options.name: -rise
options.description: Applies the assertion at the rising edge of the signal on the path endpoints

options.name: -rise_from
options.description: Applies the minimum delay constraint at the rising edge of the signal on the from pins

options.name: -rise_through
options.description: Applies the assertion at the rising edge of the signal on the through pins

options.name: -rise_to
options.description: Applies the minimum delay constraint at the rising edge of the signal on the to pins

options.name: -through
options.description: Applies the constraint to both the rising and the falling edges

options.name: -to
options.description: Applies the minimum delay constraint to all paths ending in the -to pin list
